DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CAROLE LARSEN'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PERSONS MOST QUALIFIED AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 18, 2016, TO GIVE THE PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE PARTIES MUST SERVE VIA EXPRESS MAIL, FILE-ENDORSED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING, OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, ON JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES FLEMMING AT 11 SNOW COURT ORINDA, CA 94563, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 12, 2016, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS RECEIVED APPROXIMATELY 1200 PAGES OF DOCUMENTS APPARENTLY RELATED TO THIS MOTION, BUT NONE OF THE DOCUMENTS ARE FILE-ENDORSED AS REQUIRED AND NONE OF THE EXHIBITS ARE TABBED AS REQUIRED. JUDGE PRO TEM; JAMES FLEMING CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Continued To Jun-13-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order-Discovery Motion
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Carole Larsen'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Persons Most Qualified And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. Plaintiff Carole Larsen's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Persons Most Qualified And Request For Production Of Documents is taken off calendar per moving parties request. (302/HK)

Motion To Compel Deposition Of Persons Most Qualified And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAROLE LARSEN's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Persons Most Qualified And Request For Production Of Documents is continued to February 18, 2016, to give the parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.7B. The parties must serve via express mail, file-endorsed courtesy copies of the moving, opposition and reply papers with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, on Judge Pro Tem James Flemming at 11 Snow Court Orinda, CA 94563, no later than February 12, 2016, or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per California Rules of Court 3.1110(f). The court has received approximately 1200 pages of documents apparently related to this motion, but none of the documents are file-endorsed as required and none of the exhibits are tabbed as required. Judge Pro tem; James Fleming Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
